goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 19:00'.
The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'south' and should serve 'modern european' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '10:00' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 19:00
The train should go to stansted airport and should leave on thursday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the south and should serve modern european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 10:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
